prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, Nigerian heritage, dark skin, close-cropped hair with a sharp fade, no glasses, wearing a light blue button-down shirt with sleeves rolled to the elbows) sits at a desk surrounded by four different monitors. Each screen shows a completely different dashboard design — one dark-themed with pie charts, one bright with bar graphs, one spreadsheet-heavy, one with a clunky form interface. Tangled cables between the monitors. Post-it notes everywhere. A coffee cup sits precariously close to the edge. Late afternoon light through office windows. His expression says 'there has to be a better way.' Show the chaos of managing campaigns across incompatible platforms. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam sits frustrated at a desk surrounded by four monitors showing completely different dashboard designs — tangled cables, post-it notes everywhere, a coffee cup near the edge

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, no glasses, light blue button-down with rolled sleeves) types a campaign brief on his laptop. The brief text glows with teal energy and radiates outward as three clean rays of light, each reaching a different seller agent robot. The robots stand at podiums with subtle icons — a TV (CTV), a monitor (display), and headphones (audio). Each robot leans forward with interest, examining the incoming brief. The rays are standardized — same width, same format — emphasizing that one brief reaches all three. Clean, hopeful energy. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam types a campaign brief that radiates as three identical rays of light to seller agent robots at CTV, display, and audio podiums

prompt: Three seller robots present their proposals back to Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, no glasses, light blue button-down with rolled sleeves). The CTV robot holds up a video slate with play button. The display robot presents a banner layout. The audio robot offers a waveform with companion image. Sam sits at his desk reviewing all three on a single clean screen — the proposals are displayed side by side in matching card formats. Sam looks pleased and engaged, leaning forward. Three different media types, but one unified view. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Three seller robots present video, display, and audio proposals to Sam, who reviews them side by side on a single clean screen

prompt: Creative format templates and actual ad assets snap together like puzzle pieces. A wide video frame snaps onto a video ad. A square banner template connects with display creative. An audio waveform with companion banner clicks into place. A small helper robot assists, checking each connection. Some pieces have green checkmarks (matched). One piece has a yellow gap indicator (the missing audio cut). Clean, satisfying visual of things fitting together perfectly. Bright, organized workspace. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Creative format templates snap together like puzzle pieces — video, display, and audio assets click into place with green checkmarks, while a helper robot checks each connection

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, no glasses, light blue button-down with rolled sleeves) presses a glowing teal launch button on his desk. Above him, a holographic campaign blueprint materializes in the air — it shows three branches radiating from a central campaign node, each ending at a seller robot who receives the allocation. The whole scene has an air of confidence and precision — one button, three platforms, everything connected. Sam's expression is focused and determined. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam presses a glowing teal launch button and a holographic campaign blueprint materializes above — three branches radiate to seller robots, each receiving their allocation

prompt: The holographic campaign blueprint passes through a security checkpoint. A governance agent robot with a shield emblem stands at the checkpoint, scanning each branch of the campaign. Three inspection panels float nearby showing checkmarks: budget (green check with dollar sign), brand safety (green check with shield), targeting compliance (green check with map pin). The guardian robot stamps the campaign with an approval seal. A human supervisor stands behind, nodding with arms crossed. Professional, secure, trustworthy atmosphere. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: A governance agent robot at a security checkpoint scans the campaign blueprint — three floating panels show green checkmarks for budget, brand safety, and targeting compliance

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, no glasses, light blue button-down with rolled sleeves) leans back comfortably at his desk — relaxed posture, slight smile, hands behind head. His single monitor shows a clean, unified dashboard with rising bar charts (teal colored), converging line graphs, and performance metrics. In the background, three small seller robots send data streams (thin teal lines) that converge into the dashboard. The contrast with scene 1 is stark: one screen, one view, no chaos. Late afternoon golden light, calm productive energy. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam leans back relaxed at his desk with one clean dashboard showing merged metrics from all three sellers — the contrast with the chaotic multi-screen setup from scene 1 is stark
